description_long: This object is a rectangular architectural model depicting a residential neighborhood with multiple detached houses arranged around a central green space. The houses are primarily white and gray with dark roofs, and the layout includes paved roads and pathways winding through the area. The base of the model features a geometric pattern in shades of gray, adding a modern visual accent. The houses are organized in a planned, suburban style, with small yards and driveways visible. The model's surface is mostly flat, with some slight elevation changes to represent landscaping. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary suburban development with a focus on community and green space.
description: A detailed model of a suburban residential neighborhood with multiple white and gray houses, dark roofs, and a central green area, set on a geometric-patterned base.
description_view_0: This view shows the model from the side, highlighting the geometric pattern on the base and a partial view of the houses and green space.
description_view_1: This view presents the model from the opposite side, focusing on the rear of the houses and the arrangement of the neighborhood's roadways.
description_view_2: This view displays the front of the model, offering a clear look at the houses, central green area, and the geometric base design.
description_view_3: This view shows the model from the side, emphasizing the neighborhood's layout and the transition between the built and landscaped areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main doors with small porches and steps, minimal decorative elements
